channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Famed NFL coach Tony Dungy shuts down speculation that he was considering Senate run
item.description: An online rumor circulated that famed NFL coach Tony Dungy was considering a Senate run, but he shut down the idea in a recent post on X.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jazz trade Mills and Eubanks for Bamba and Tucker
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Five days before the NBA trade deadline, the Utah Jazz have made a deal with the Los Angeles Clippers. The Jazz have acquired center Mo Bamba, forward P.J.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Tennis great Pam Shriver reunited with stolen trophies taken while evacuating Los Angeles wildfires
item.description: Pam Shriver has been reunited with several of her trophies after her car, which contained those items, was stolen after she had evacuated her home because of the L.A. wildfires.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 3 more massage therapists accuse Ravens' Tucker of sexually inappropriate conduct, report says
item.description: The Baltimore Banner reports that three additional massage therapists have accused Baltimore Ravens kicker Justin Tucker of sexually inappropriate conduct.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: A.J. Brown felt like a 'paid actor' in Eagles' Super Bowl loss to Kansas City
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — A.J. Brown lingered with some of his Eagles teammates outside the Los Angeles Lakers' locker room like any fan who had even a hint of a chance to hug it out with LeBron James.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Shi’s unstoppable: American sophomore is a scoring machine
item.description: Shirina Shi averages 25 points per game for American-Fremont: ‘She’s a great all-around player who will get even better’
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: The NBA trade deadline is coming, with Butler and Fox perhaps available for teams looking to deal
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Jimmy Butler remains part of the Miami Heat, for now. De'Aaron Fox is still with the Sacramento Kings, for now. And Golden State coach Steve Kerr seemed to indicate that the Warriors are seriously weighing their options. It's NBA trade deadline countdown time. There could be chaos.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rangers get center J.T. Miller from Canucks in multiplayer deal
item.description: The New York Rangers acquired veteran center J.T. Miller from the Vancouver Canucks in a multiplayer deal on Friday night. The Rangers sent center Filip Chytil, defenseman Victor Mancini and a 2025 conditional draft pick to Vancouver.
item.dc:creator: VIN A. CHERWOO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: At least 18 objections filed to $2.8B NCAA antitrust settlement, lawyers confident of approval
item.description: At least 18 objections have been filed against the $2.8 billion settlement of antitrust allegations against the NCAA and the nation's biggest conferences — concerns ranging from roster limits and Title IX to what some call an unfair salary cap — but attorneys say they don't see any threats to pushin
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NFL officials spotting the football isn't going away despite several technological advances
item.description: The NFL will engage its Competition Committee on technology to take virtual line-to-gain measurements next season, but officials will continue to spot the football.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Terry Rozier declines to address investigation, says he won't have issue focusing on basketball
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Terry Rozier declined to answer questions Friday about the investigations by federal prosecutors into unusual betting patterns surrounding his play in a game when he was with the Charlotte Hornets in 2023.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Padres FanFest returns to Petco Park: what to know before you go
item.description: It's that time of year again: Padres FanFest is back and is expected to be bigger than ever, according to a spokesperson with the San Diego Padres.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Local pro bull rider representing Navajo Nation
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Pro Bull Riders Tour is coming back to Salt Lake City next weekend for the Unleash the Beats event at the Delta Center. At this level, the relationship between bull rider and bull has to be in sync, like a wild dance.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: McDonald's announces Angel Reese Special, set to debut in February
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — Angel Reese is set to add another first to her list of celebrity endorsements and accomplishments. In a post on X, fast food mega-chain McDonald's announced "The Angel Reese Special," will debut on Feb. 10 in collaboration with the Chicago Sky's star power forward.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Porzingis hits eight 3s, scores 34 as Bulls open 3-game road trip with blowout loss in Boston
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Kristaps Porzingis scored 26 of his season-high 34 points in the first half Wednesday night, and the Boston Celtics coasted to a 122-100 victory over the Bulls in the first game of Chicago's three-game road trip.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Aggies avenge loss to UNLV, 76-71
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Five Aggies scored in double figures, as Utah State avenged its only Mountain West Conference loss of the season against UNLV Wednesday night, 76-71.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Fruita boys win 2OT thriller at Montrose for first place in SWL, as Fruita girls dominate Red Hawks
item.description: One of the most highly anticipated games of the season, Montrose vs. Fruita, a battle of the top two teams in the Southwestern league, exceeded expectations.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: UVU hoping to make first NCAA Tournament
item.description: OREM, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Duke, Michigan State, Auburn, Houston andUtah Valley? All of those college basketball teams own double-digit winning streaks right now, with the Wolverines having just won their tenth in a row.
item.dc:creator: Wesley Ruff, ABC 4

item.title: Bulls bench big in 129-121 win over Nuggets
item.description: Nikola Vucevic had 20 points, 10 rebounds and six assists, and the Chicago Bulls handed the Denver Nuggets their second straight loss with a 129-121 victory on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: White Sox release 2025 promotional schedule
item.description: The Chicago White Sox have announced their promotions schedule for the 2025 MLB season, including limited-edition items and a first-ever Sunday Bobblehead Collector’s Series, to commemorate the 125-year anniversary of the team's founding.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Bills cornerback Christian Benford ruled out of AFC title game vs. Chiefs with a concussion
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Buffalo Bills cornerback Christian Benford was ruled out of the AFC title game against the Kansas City Chiefs on Sunday night with a concussion.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Ryan Pressly waives no-trade clause to join the Chicago Cubs, AP source says
item.description: The Chicago Cubs are finalizing a trade for Ryan Pressly, adding the right-hander to the back end of their bullpen in their second major offseason deal with the Houston Astros.
item.dc:creator: JAY COHEN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Report: Cubs trade for Astros former All-Star closer
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago Cubs are finalizing a deal to acquire Houston Astros' former All-Star closer Ryan Pressly, according to reports. ESPN's Jeff Passan reports the trade is pending medical review and Pressly will waive his no-trade clause to facilitate the trade to Chicago.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Ohio State celebrates national championship run amid change and farewells
item.description: Fans braved 30-degree temperatures to welcome home a team that beat five top-10 rivals on its way to the title, including Oregon in the Rose Bowl, Texas in the Cotton Bowl and Notre Dame in the College Football Playoff championship game.
item.dc:creator: NICOLE KRAFT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jayden Daniels auctioning off custom jacket; proceeds to benefit LAFD
item.description: Jayden Daniels may be focusing on Sunday’s NFC Championship matchup against the Philadelphia Eagles, but he doesn’t forget about where he came from. In the wake of the devastating Los Angeles area wildfires, Daniels, a San Bernardino native, is auctioning off a personalized jacket.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Runnin' Utes get swept by Baylor, 76-61
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was a tough week offensively for the Utah basketball team. After scoring just 35 points against Houston, the Utes put up 61 in a 76-61 loss to Baylor Saturday at the Huntsman Center. Norchad Omier had 22 points and 12 rebounds, and V.J.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
